title: thysanotus triandrus var. bentianus
intro: Thysanotus triandrus var. bentianus, commonly known as the bent's purple coral pea or bent's coral pea, is a plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family. It is native to Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thysanotus triandrus var. bentianus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin infections, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
